# Slug Reference Intake

This directory is the provenance-tracked intake area for public Slug reference materials that
influence the Harvest Scribe implementation.

Intended contents:

- upstream reference HLSL shaders,
- upstream notices and license texts,
- Harvest-authored provenance metadata,
- no Harvest-specific modifications in-place.

Harvest-specific Slang wrappers should live outside this directory in first-party source once
milestone M1 begins.
